_purpose: Sub-project #9 OCI capture override. Wide-open run to capture circuit_t1_fade_short trades for the gauntlet (Stages 0-3) cell-selection across full 2023-24. Locked criteria per tools/sub9_research/circuit_t1_cell_selection_locked.json — DO NOT iterate after seeing results (lesson 2026-05-01).
_comment_cross_cutting: Same cross-cutting rules as sub8 capture; circuit-band exclusion intentionally LEFT ENABLED — circuit_t1_fade_short fires on T+1 of T-1 circuit-hit stocks, so the T+1 distance-to-circuit-band check at entry time is design-aligned (the residual-gap fade thesis assumes the band has been re-relaxed by 09:15 T+1 already).
_comment_setups: Three setups enabled simultaneously: gap_fade_short (TRUSTED baseline), expiry_pin_strike_reversal (DEFERRED but capture-ready post option-chain fix in d50b28f), circuit_t1_fade_short (NEW — first sub-9 setup needing gauntlet/cell selection). All three captured in the same wide-open run so trades can be cross-analyzed without confounding from separate captures.
